sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
from collections import Counter

# Check current state
seg = current_frame.segmentation
N_nodes = [n for n in seg['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'N']
print(f"Green crosses: {len(N_nodes)}")
for n in N_nodes:
    b = n['boundary']
    rows = [p[0] for p in b]
    cols = [p[1] for p in b]
    center_r = (min(rows) + max(rows)) // 2
    center_c = (min(cols) + max(cols)) // 2
    print(f"  row=[{min(rows)},{max(rows)}], col=[{min(cols)},{max(cols)}], center=({center_r},{center_c})")

# Click the first cross at center (19, 30)
print("\n=== Click cross at (19, 30) ===")
result = action([{'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 19, 'col': 30}])

seg = current_frame.segmentation
G_nodes = [n for n in seg['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'G']
g_nodes = [n for n in seg['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'g']
N_nodes = [n for n in seg['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'N']
print(f"After click: G={len(G_nodes)}, g={len(g_nodes)}, N={len(N_nodes)}")

# Check grid
print("\nGrid area (row 17-22):")
ascii_lines = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')
for i in range(17, 23):
    print(f"{i}: {ascii_lines[i][10:48]}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>

    center_r = (min(rows) + max(rows)) // 2
    center_c = (min(cols) + max(cols)) // 2
    print(f"  row=[{min(rows)},{max(rows)}], col=[{min(cols)},{max(cols)}], center=({center_r},{center_c})")

# Click the first cross at center (19, 30)
print("\n=== Click cross at (19, 30) ===")
result = action([{'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 19, 'col': 30}])

seg = current_frame.segmentation
G_nodes = [n for n in seg['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'G']
g_nodes = [n for n in seg['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'g']
N_nodes = [n for n in seg['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'N']
print(f"After click: G={len(G_nodes)}, g={len(g_nodes)}, N={len(N_nodes)}")

# Check grid
print("\nGrid area (row 17-22):")
ascii_lines = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')
for i in range(17, 23):
    print(f"{i}: {ascii_lines[i][10:48]}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
